title: euphrasia nemorosa subsp. cebennensis
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. cebennensis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as a type of eye bright or woodland eye bright. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing eye inflammation, improving vision, and supporting the immune system. Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. cebennensis can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
